---
title: "第5章"
---

# 第5章 函数形式变换

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/emetrics26/chap5slide.html){target="_blank"}

#  Eviews操作

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews中双对数模型的估计](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1sG4y1t7Wh/){target="_blank"} 
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews中对数-线性模型的估计](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1RP411F7yG/){target="_blank"} 
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews中如何计算Y的估计值？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Jd4y1F7ze){target="_blank"} 
    

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews时间序列趋势分析——对数线性模型和线性趋势模型](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1684y1v7xb/){target="_blank"}
    
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 多项式、双对数、倒数模型](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1xT4y1F7oS/){target="_blank"} 

# R教学视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[回归分析中的对数变换------双对数模型、半对数模型的估计](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1de4y127Ni){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何在回归模型中引入解释变量的平方项？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ie4y147eH){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何利用回归模型进行预测？predict()函数的运用](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Av4y1D7uq){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[R中如何估计过原点的回归模型？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1bP411w7vy/){target="_blank"}

# 习题答案

<details>
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold;">点击展开</summary>

<p>如果想在新窗口打开 PDF，请点这里： <a href="img/EE4_Ch05_Solutions_Manual.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">在新标签页中查看 PDF</a></p>

<iframe src="img/EE4_Ch05_Solutions_Manual.pdf" width="100%" height="800" style="border: none;" allowfullscreen>
  <!-- 备用内容（若浏览器不支持 iframe） -->
  <p>你的浏览器无法嵌入 PDF，请 <a href="img/EE4_Ch05_Solutions_Manual.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">点此下载/查看 PDF</a>.</p>
</iframe>

</details>

# 习题讲评视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题5.17+5.25+5.26](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}
